---
title: Valloire
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1757411754/alpes_cuhbzq.png
description: Figure de paille à Valloire
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2024/10/03
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1757411754/alpes_cuhbzq.png)
